## 🔗 TRACEABILITY
Closes #<issue-number>
Requirement: RQ-### or TBD

## 🛡️ PRE-MERGE CHECKLIST
- [ ] No duplicate or conflicting logic introduced
- [ ] No non-canonical state/status values introduced
- [ ] If UI: backend implemented and validated first
- [ ] `PROGRESS` and `NEXT` updated in issue

## 🧪 VALIDATION
- [ ] npm run review:gate
- [ ] npm run test:smoke (or equivalent)

## 📝 SUMMARY
- What changed and why
